summary:
The patient presents with symptoms consistent with generalized anxiety disorder, including persistent worry, inability to concentrate, and stress-related difficulties. Cognitive behavioral therapy (CBT) is supported by strong evidence as first-line treatment due to its effectiveness in addressing maladaptive thoughts and improving daily functioning.  

\boxed{D}
